  • Method Details

    • calculateGrade

      public static String calculateGrade​(int marks)
      Calculates the grade based on the given marks.
      Parameters:
      marks - the marks obtained by the student (0â€“100)
      Returns:
      the grade as a String (A+, A, B, C, Fail)
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if marks are outside 0â€“100

    • isPass

      public static boolean isPass​(int marks)
      Determines whether a student has passed based on marks.
      Parameters:
      marks - the marks obtained
      Returns:
      true if marks are 50 or above, false otherwise

    • calculateAverage

      public static double calculateAverage​(int[] marks)
      Calculates the average of an array of marks.
      Parameters:
      marks - an array of integer marks
      Returns:
      the average value as a double
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the array is null or empty

    • findMax

      public static int findMax​(int[] marks)
      Finds the maximum (highest) value in the marks array.
      Parameters:
      marks - an array of integer marks
      Returns:
      the highest mark
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the array is null or empty

    • findMin

      public static int findMin​(int[] marks)
      Finds the minimum (lowest) value in the marks array.
      Parameters:
      marks - an array of integer marks
      Returns:
      the lowest mark
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the array is null or empty
